checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: First GEN-011 validation pass: 24 node tests passed, MDE parser passed, traceability validator checked 14 files, fixture index and evaluation checks passed.

checks.name: live Cranfield baseline evaluation
checks.evidence: Baseline live run over 225 queries at K=10 with retrieval depth 50 produced MAP 0.2402, nDCG@10 0.2995, Precision@10 0.2316, Recall@10 0.3994, MRR 0.5350.

checks.name: live candidate evaluations
checks.evidence: Query-rescue regressed all core metrics; field-sum improved all core metrics and was kept as transferability-pending candidate.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; the public default remains ARCH-0.1.

high_findings.summary: Field-sum improved Cranfield metrics but needs BEIR transferability before release.

evidence_quality: Live OpenSearch evidence plus query-level behavior groups provide enough signal to reject query-rescue and carry field-sum into Phase 2 transferability.
